_comment: Which item base types can be turned into a unique with an Orb of Chance. Curated from poe2db.tw (game-data extraction) + Maxroll 0.5.2. A base qualifies when it has at least one globally-droppable unique, is a plain base tier (not Advanced/Expert), and is in released content. See HANDOFF gotcha #3.

not_chanceable_notable.reason: Boss-locked drop (poe2db: 'Dropped by The Trialmaster'); not in the Orb of Chance global pool.
